nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马代拉河
nodes.summary: 马代拉河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联55种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、Pale-winged trumpeter等55种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Vulturine parrot
nodes.summary: Vulturine parrot（Vulturine parrot，学名 Pyrilia vulturina），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 马拉尼昂州
nodes.summary: 马拉尼昂州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联58种鸟类，包括White-browed guan、Buff-browed chachalaca、Black rail等58种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The vulturine parrot is found in Brazil south of the Amazon River from the Madeira River east to near the Atlantic coast in Maranhão

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The vulturine parrot is found in Brazil south of the Amazon River from the Madeira River east to near the Atlantic coast in Maranhão

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits both fairly dry terra firme and seasonally flooded várzea forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits both fairly dry terra firme and seasonally flooded várzea forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The primary threat to this species is accelerating deforestation in the Amazon basin as land is cleared for cattle ranching and soy production, facilitated by expansion of the road network." It is considered uncommon throughout its range
